modelEn: UDD バッグ 380DX
description: A water-resistant model of high-performance down has been completed ■Comfortable operating temperature: 3℃/lower limit temperature: -2℃ ■Short (up to 165cm tall), Regular (166cm to 178cm tall), Long (179cm to 185cm tall) ■Long size has 20g more feathers + 1,650 yen (tax included) *The season varies depending on the region and environment in which it is used. When purchasing, please check the area and environment in which you plan to use it. A 3-season (spring, summer, fall) model with a streamlined and lightweight design.The fabric is made from water-repellent nylon fabric. The down material is UDD DX (770FP), which is a high-quality, high-performance down with super water-repellent treatment applied to DX (Spanish white duck down) feathers. The biggest drawback of down is that it gets wet. This is because when moisture is added to the down, it does not expand sufficiently and its heat retention properties decrease. UDD solved this problem. Therefore, you can use it without worrying about moisture such as condensation. Made of thin 15dn nylon fabric and high fill power down, it inflates quickly. By shortening the inflation time, you can quickly protect yourself from the cold. Made of thin and light fabric, it is more compact and lighter to carry. It also reduces the time it takes to store and prepare for departure. Recommended for people who want to carry a sleeping bag as light and compact as possible when camping overnight in a tent or hiking vertically, and for people who have a long day's journey and want to shorten the time to retreat as much as possible. On rainy days or when you get wet due to condensation, you can use it in conjunction with the WATER PROOF SLEEPING BAG COVER. Also, when used in conjunction with SLEEPING BAG INNER SHEET, it protects your sleeping bag from stains caused by sweat and sebum. It also helps keep it away from your skin, making you comfortable to sleep on. Nylon is easy to clean and dries quickly. It is also characterized by its soft and smooth texture, making it comfortable to sleep on. UDD: 770FP high quality and highly functional down with water repellent finish. We use duck feathers that have been raised for approximately 90 days in a natural environment. The down that has grown three times during the breeding period has large down balls, is strong, and is of high quality. This cost-effective DX down has been treated with a super water-repellent finish. The top has a box quilt structure and the bottom has a single quilt structure to efficiently warm your body. Recommended for activities from early summer to early fall. Draw cord: A draw cord is provided around the face to keep it warm. Mesh bag included: Yes Click here for information on how to store and store the sleeping bag. Here are the points to consider when choosing a sleeping bag. <Estimated time of use> *The time of use will vary depending on the scene of use, weather, gender, etc. Please use this as a guide only. *Short size is only available in BEG (beige) and long size is only available in CHA (charcoal). *Long size is 20g more feather and will cost 1,500 yen (excluding tax) more. *Short size is the same price as regular size.

modelEn: 【Re:ACT】ソナエバッグ / 1set
description: 📢 We are giving away original knapsacks in limited quantities 🎁 Transform your duvet into a sleeping bag that will help you prepare for emergencies! Click here to order 2 sets SONAE BAG, which helps you prepare for anything, is now available as a new menu item at Re:ACT! When you order from this page, one SONAE BAG will be made from one duvet. If you only make one feather, you'll end up with a lot of leftover feathers... There's no need to worry about that! NANGA responsibly purchases the remaining feathers, goes through an appropriate process, and recycles them into other products. We will transform your existing duvet into a sleeping bag "SONAE BAG" exclusively for Re:ACT. In addition, this project is based on the concept of ``preparing for emergencies'' and will be delivered as a set of three-season air mattresses so that you can use them immediately, anytime, anywhere. ``SONAE BAG'' is an entry-level model that pursues functionality and is easy to use even for those using sleeping bags for the first time. The amount of feathers after finishing is 350g, which is the optimal amount of feathers for a 3-season model. Whether you're camping, sleeping in your car, or living in a harsh evacuation zone, you can easily take it out of the bag and use it, and it will be reborn as a lightweight and compact product that is easy to carry. Please check out the duvets in your home or family closet! <SONAE BAG Item Details> The structure of the sleeping bag body uses a "tapered shape" that combines the best features of a mummy shape and an envelope shape. The legroom is spacious and doesn't make you feel cramped, so even people with bad sleeping positions can sleep comfortably. The neck and feet are open, but you can tighten the drawcord to keep the heat from escaping, or you can open it to instantly release heat, making it easy to adjust the temperature. The provided bag can be used in a variety of ways, such as a case that can be used to hold a pillow or hot water bottle, or a packable specification that can be used to store the sleeping bag itself. As an added bonus, it also has a coupling function that allows you to connect it with a zipper, so it can also be used as a large sleeping bag for two people. If you remove the side zipper, it quickly transforms into a single thin comforter! It is easy to use in a variety of situations, and its great appeal is that it can be used in ways that cannot be achieved with the mummy type. <Air Mat Item Details> The air mat has an R value of 2.9, and we have prepared a 3-season model that matches the sleeping bag that we have remade. When you inflate it, you can feel the exquisite cushioning that supports a comfortable sleep. Another nice feature is that it comes with an inflation dry sack (storage bag instead of a pump) for inflating the air mattress. You can easily inflate the Inflation Dry Sack by simply fixing it to the mattress valve and pushing in the air, so you don't have to use any physical effort or worry about running out of breath. The valve is also equipped with a return valve, so you can easily inflate without wasting even the slightest amount of air. *R value is a unit used as an index to express insulation power. *In order to prioritize cost performance, we have not passed the ASTM-F3340-18 standard for measuring the R value, but the ASTM-F3340-18 standard result for a similar product manufactured by a mattress manufacturing factory in the past was an R value of 2.9, so this value is indicated. Sleeping is important for living, not just outdoors. Disasters sometimes occur even though no one expected them to occur, and each time, disasters occur.

modelEn: ソナエバッグ 350DX
description: SONAE BAG using DX feathers A model using DX feathers has been released from Nanga's disaster prevention sleeping bag "SONAE BAG". This model was created in response to requests for something warm even with a small amount of feathers. SONAE BAG 350DX is filled with Spanish duck down (90% down, 10% feather), which is often used in NANGA's down jackets, making it a lightweight, compact yet warm sleeping bag. This is a 3-season model that can be used from late spring to early fall. It can be used in a variety of ways outside of the applicable seasons, such as by opening the zipper and using it as a large blanket or comforter, or by storing it in the included pillow pocket and using it as a cushion. It's an excellent item that can be used in many ways that regular mummy types can't, and can serve several purposes. Of course, it is sure to be useful not only for disaster prevention, but also for camping and sleeping in the car. Please take a look at the set with the air mattress. <SONAE BAG Item Details> The structure of the sleeping bag body adopts a "tapered shape" that combines the best features of a mummy shape and an envelope shape. The legroom is spacious and doesn't make you feel cramped, so even people with bad sleeping positions can sleep comfortably. The neck and feet are open, but you can tighten the drawcord to keep heat from escaping, or you can open it to instantly release heat, making it easy to adjust the temperature. The built-in bag inside the sleeping bag can be used in a variety of ways, such as a case that can be used to hold a pillow or hot water bottle, or a packable bag that can be used to store the sleeping bag itself. As an added bonus, it also has a coupling function that allows you to connect it with a zipper, so it can also be used as a large sleeping bag for two people. If you remove the side zipper, it quickly transforms into a single thin comforter! It is easy to use in a variety of situations, and its great appeal is that it can be used in ways that cannot be achieved with the mummy type. <Air Mat Item Details> The air mat has an R value of 2.9, and we have prepared a 3-season model that matches the sleeping bag that we have remade. When you inflate it, you can feel the exquisite cushioning that supports a comfortable sleep. Another nice feature is that it comes with an inflation dry sack (storage bag instead of a pump) for inflating the air mattress. You can easily inflate the Inflation Dry Sack by simply fixing it to the mattress valve and pushing in the air, so you don't have to use any physical effort or worry about running out of breath. The valve is also equipped with a return valve, so you can easily inflate without wasting even the slightest amount of air. *R value is a unit used as an index to express insulation power. *In order to prioritize cost performance, we have not passed the ASTM-F3340-18 standard for measuring the R value, but the ASTM-F3340-18 standard result for a similar product manufactured by a mattress manufacturing factory in the past was an R value of 2.9, so this value is indicated. *The inflation dry sack in the video is an alternative product. modelEn: マット コンパチブル バッグ
description: Newly designed sleeping bag with integrated mat A structure that allows the sleeping bag and mat to be integrated is adopted. By placing a sleeve (storage bag) on ​​the back of the sleeping bag to prevent the mat from shifting, you can maintain a stable sleeping position while sleeping. The integrated structure also reduces the cold caused by cold air from the ground. In pursuit of weight reduction, the fabric is made of thin 15DN ripstop nylon. A box quilt structure is used on the top surface, which tends to feel cold, to efficiently retain heat. On the other hand, the back is designed to be integrated with the mat, so it does not contain feathers and is lightweight. The filling contains 350g of high quality feathers (90% down, 10% feather/760FP). It can be used with confidence in a wide range of situations, from sleeping in the car to summer mountains and the fall foliage season. This product comes with a 3-season air mattress with an R value of 2.9. <Features of the air mat> An inflation dry sack (a storage bag that can be used as a pump) is included to inflate the air mat. Simply connect the dry sack to the mat's valve and push in air to inflate it, without using any physical effort or worrying about running out of breath. In addition, the valve is equipped with a backflow prevention valve, which allows efficient injection while preventing air from flowing back. *R value is an index that indicates insulation performance. *This product prioritizes cost performance and has not been measured according to the ASTM F3340-18 standard, but the R value of a product with similar specifications previously manufactured at a mattress manufacturing factory was 2.9, so this value is shown as a reference value.

Supports a comfortable sleep in a variety of situations, such as sleeping in a tent or in a car. Approximately 7cm thick cushioning absorbs unevenness on the ground and provides a comfortable sleeping experience. The surface is made of a finely brushed material with excellent quietness, and the back side is made of anti-slip material to reduce noise and slippage when turning over. Inflation can be easily completed by simply pushing in the stuff sack integrated pump. Although it has high insulation performance, it is packed in an easy-to-carry size that supports comfortable sleep even during winter camping. RAIKOT #2 (R5.0) RAIKOT #1 (R2.5) Comfortable operating temperature Around -17℃ Around 0℃ Compatible seasons All seasons including winter Spring to autumn (3 seasons) R value (weight / thermal layer) R5.0 (665g ±5% / 200g thermal layer) R2.5 (516g ±5% / 60g thermal layer) Expanded size 183 x 51cm 183 x 51cm Storage size (approx.) Length 23 x Diameter 14cm (Approx.) Length 23 x Diameter 12cm Main features Highly insulated, suitable for winter camping Lightweight and portable
highlights: Comfortable temperature around -17℃ | Highly insulated model for severe winters
Made of finely brushed material that feels good on the skin and anti-slip material that is hard to slip.
Silicone prints are placed in weight-bearing areas to prevent the sleeping bag from shifting.
Light and compact, can be stored neatly in a backpack

modelEn: ラバイマ バッグ ダブル 1000
description: Double size model for winter Roomy envelope type series A hooded envelope type series proposed by NANGA. Available in 1-person and 2-person versions, all models have a draft tube to prevent cold air from entering through the zipper side. It has a rational structure, with the top layer made of down, which is highly heat-retaining and lightweight, and the bottom layer made of synthetic cotton (single-quilt structure), which collapses under weight. This series is useful not only for camping and outdoor festivals, but also for sleeping at home or in your car.

modelEn: レベル8 -10 UDDバッグ
description: A -10°C compatible model designed for high-end winter mountaineering in Japan.Made with water-repellent nylon fabric that is lightweight, water-repellent, and highly flexible, and uses ultra-water-repellent UDD DX for down. While it is lightweight at approximately 1,140g, comfort is also ensured through a design that efficiently retains heat inside the sleeping bag. The normal model has the zipper located on the side, but the LEVEL 8 has a new zipper located closer to the chest. Reduces cold air intrusion from the ground. In addition to shoulder warmers and a waist tube, a double draft tube is installed behind the zipper to improve heat retention. By setting the back as a vertical baffle, it is possible to suppress the unevenness of the down due to turning over in bed. The foot box is larger than the regular model, and more down is included. This protects your feet from the cold. About LEVEL8 <Estimated usage period> *The usage period will vary depending on the scene of use, weather, gender, etc. Please use this as a guide only. ?

modelEn: （数量限定）ソナエバッグ 350
description: That disaster prevention sleeping bag is now available in limited quantities! SONAE BAG, which could only be made with Re:ACT, is now on sale! ``SONAE BAG'' is an entry model that pursues functionality and is easy to use even for those using sleeping bags for the first time. The amount of feathers is 350g, which is suitable for warm spring to autumn, so it can be used for a long time in camping situations. The source of the recycled feathers used in this product is Re:ACT, a duvet remaking service. This product uses 100% recycled down collected in-house (blending ratio: 80% down, 20% feathers), which is re-refined from the excess feathers that come out during the process of adjusting the amount of feathers to the appropriate amount during Re:ACT. <SONAE BAG Item Details> The structure of the sleeping bag body adopts a "tapered shape" that combines the best features of a mummy shape and an envelope shape. The legroom is spacious and doesn't make you feel cramped, so even people with bad sleeping positions can sleep comfortably. The neck and feet are open, but you can tighten the drawcord to keep heat from escaping, or you can open it to instantly release heat, making it easy to adjust the temperature. The built-in bag inside the sleeping bag can be used in a variety of ways, such as a case that can be used to hold a pillow or hot water bottle, or a packable bag that can be used to store the sleeping bag itself. As an added bonus, it also has a coupling function that allows you to connect it with a zipper, so it can also be used as a large sleeping bag for two people. If you remove the side zipper, it quickly transforms into a single thin comforter! It is easy to use in a variety of situations, and its great appeal is that it can be used in ways that cannot be achieved with the mummy type. <Air Mat Item Details> The air mat has an R value of 2.9, and we have prepared a 3-season model that matches the sleeping bag that we have remade. When you inflate it, you can feel the exquisite cushioning that supports a comfortable sleep. Another nice feature is that it comes with an inflation dry sack (storage bag instead of a pump) for inflating the air mattress. You can easily inflate the Inflation Dry Sack by simply fixing it to the mattress valve and pushing in the air, so you don't have to use any physical effort or worry about running out of breath. The valve is also equipped with a return valve, so you can easily inflate without wasting even the slightest amount of air. *R value is a unit used as an index to express insulation power. *In order to prioritize cost performance, we have not passed the ASTM-F3340-18 standard for measuring the R value, but the ASTM-F3340-18 standard result for a similar product manufactured by a mattress manufacturing factory in the past was an R value of 2.9, so this value is indicated. *The inflation dry sack in the video is an alternative product. Sleeping is important for living, not just outdoors. Sometimes disasters occur even though no one expected them to occur, and each time we see in the news the hardships faced by those affected. At times like these, if you can get some peace of mind by sleeping comfortably. If NANGA can help in some way, we have produced a cost-effective product that can also be kept for disaster prevention. Please take this opportunity to review your preparations.
